Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: An employee record in the organization ledger

id.description: The unique employee ID (e.g. EMP-001 or EMP_TEMP_006)

monthlySalary.description: Monthly base salary of the employee

workingDays.description: Designated working days in the month

fullDaysAbsent.description: Number of full days employee was absent

absentHours.description: Number of partial hours employee was absent

absentMinutes.description: Number of partial minutes employee was absent

notes.description: Array of string log messages or annotations

documents.description: Array of uploaded documents with name, size, date details

PunchLog.title: Punch Log
PunchLog.description: A collection of check-in and check-out events for an employee on a single day

id.description: Date of punch log in YYYY-MM-DD format

date.description: Date of the punch log in YYYY-MM-DD format

punches.description: Array of strings representing up to 8 max IN-OUT log events (e.g. 08:00 IN)

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Rosters and employee records inside the Firestore ledger

/employees/{employeeId}/punches/{date}.description: Daily biometric punch IN-OUT logs array for the employee
